examples of opening lines. We talk about opening lines a lot, and I'm a real stickler for them, especially
on emails, especially on ads, because I've seen from testing that a really good opening line can literally
drastically change the conversion rate of an ad or an email or of a sales letter. So, um, and the biggest
problem Stephanie, I see by far is what we call throat clearing basically instead of getting to the really
hard hitting line right away, you kind of use a couple lines of these kind of weak sentences to build up to
it. Um, and this is very common. I mean, even very, very good copywriters still fall into this problem, but
the problem is that you have to grab them with that first line.
